_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | Event | Status | What the workspace must have done |
|---|---|---|---|
| 18 October 2023 | Regulation (EU) 2023/2405 signed | In force | — |
| 31 October 2023 | Published in Official Journal (OJ L 2023/2405) | In force | — |
| 1 January 2025 | 2% SAF minimum mandate begins at EU airports | **In force as of 1 January 2025** | SAF surcharge pass-through language in carrier and client contracts; SAF surcharge tracking mechanism operational |
| 1 January 2030 | 6% SAF mandate begins; 1.2% synthetic fuel sub-mandate begins | Future | Updated cost models; renewed contract review; EASA reporting methodology confirmed |
| 1 January 2035 | 20% SAF mandate begins; 2% synthetic fuel sub-mandate | Future | Client documentation capability for SAF-covered shipments; modal shift analysis updated |
| 1 January 2040 | 34% SAF mandate; 5% synthetic fuel sub-mandate | Future | — |
| 1 January 2045 | 42% SAF mandate; 10% synthetic fuel sub-mandate | Future | — |
| 1 January 2050 | 70% SAF mandate; 35% synthetic fuel sub-mandate | Future | — |
| TBD (no confirmed date) | European Commission delegated acts specifying SAF attribution methodology and reporting formats | Pending | Monitor EASA digital reporting tool for publication |
| TBD (formal adoption pending as of November 2025) | EU harmonised transport emissions calculation framework | Pending formal adoption | Assess implications for client Scope 3 reporting on air freight |

*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/2405, Article 4 and Annex I, Official Journal of the European Union, 31 October 2023. https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/2405/oj/eng*
*Source: Commission welcomes political agreement on new rules to harmonise transport emissions calculations in the EU, European Commission DG MOVE, 6 November 2025. https://transport.ec.europa.eu/news-events/news/commission-welcomes-political-agreement-new-rules-harmonise-transport-emissions-calculations-eu-2025-11-06_en*
